# PBB Helper UI Bundle

This directory vendors the built browser assets from the official PBB Helper library.

- Upstream: https://github.com/jybanez/helpers.pbb.ph
- Local source used for this copy: `C:\wamp64\www\hotline-helpers`
- Helper version: `0.21.90`
- Upstream commit: `14f263a`
- Local source note: refreshed from the current local Helper build for `ui.icon.grid` launcher support.
- Included files: `dist/helpers.ui.bundle.min.js`, `dist/helpers.ui.bundle.min.css`, `js/ui/ui.loader.js`

Kit Setup consumes only the `dist` bundle so the desktop installer does not carry the full helper source tree.
